title: Temporang
description: Travel through the ages using a mysterious Obelisk and an unlikely tool...
body:
# Info
![Mod Made for Modfest 1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90f122df8d950f6348ff8d7f74d1ab1773d8996d.png)

To contact me, I'm available as hyarin on Discord.
# Temporal Obelisk
Currently unavailable in survival, but can be used to find all kinds of rare items, but careful with your greed, because disasters may strike...
Throwing different types of boomerangs through the obelisk returns different items.
The rewards are data-driven.
## Stone Age
- Portable Crafting Table
- Carving Knife (turns jungle logs to totems, that give regen to nearby players)
## Iron Age
- Cannon
- Refinery (used to x2 your ores!)
## Industrial Age
- Redstone Drill
- Block Comparator (outputs redstone signal if two blocks are equal)
## Informational Age
- Mob Scanner (adds the glowing effect to nearby mobs)
- Genetic Injection (gives flight and positive effects for 90s)
